title: Paler Birch Wood
description: This Pack Aims to Improve Minecraft's Birch-Related Textures to look more like the actual wood while fitting in the game itself.
body:
This pack changes the yellowish birch to a more beautiful and paler tone.

![shaders](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com//data/o12KU5zU/images/3bd14a582ae929fa6e280b17e5af85a491ac542a.png)
